heroDescription: Learn how Bitumpro may use cookies and similar technologies to improve website functionality, understand site usage, and enhance your browsing experience.
overviewDescription: Bitumpro may use cookies and similar technologies to help the website function properly, remember basic preferences, analyze general website performance, and improve user experience. This policy explains what cookies are and how they may be used on our website.
whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They can help websites remember certain information, such as language preferences or basic browsing settings.
cookieExample: Example: A cookie may remember your preferred website language so that the site can display the correct language on your next visit.
howWeUseDescription: We may use cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
use1: Remembering language or basic website preferences
use2: Understanding general website traffic and user interactions
use3: Improving website functionality, performance, and usability
use4: Supporting contact forms, navigation, and other essential website features
managementDescription: You can control or limit the use of cookies through your browser or available website settings.
browserSettingsDescription: Most browsers allow you to block, delete, or manage cookies. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
cookieConsentDescription: Where required, we may provide cookie consent options that allow you to accept, reject, or manage certain types of cookies.
thirdPartyDescription: We may use selected third-party services that can place cookies or similar technologies to support website analytics, embedded content, or basic website functionality.
thirdParty1: Website analytics services, such as Google Analytics, where enabled
thirdParty2: Embedded content or external links, such as maps or social media links
thirdParty3: Website hosting, security, or performance tools
preferencesDescription: You may manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings or any cookie preference tools available on our website.
